title: SB 1583 — Groundwater District Management Plan Criteria
summary: Adjusts the criteria local groundwater conservation districts use to write their state-mandated management plans — the plans, built around each area's Desired Future Conditions and the resulting Modeled Available Groundwater, that govern how much groundwater may be permitted and pumped.
whyItMatters: These district plans set how much groundwater can be permitted and pumped — directly affecting landowners who own and rely on the water beneath their land.
